name: UNDISCOVERED || Petyon
description:
|| You're on a ship that just discovered a new land, of course, the crew decided to set anchor and look around if there were tribes or such, and of course colonize it. No matter how much someone whines or something, nobody seems to convince the capitan to not do this. As you all get ready for your first day there, you feel observed. You have a bad feeling about this. ||

• || Art credit: @gzgnight on X ||

• || Gender neutral user ||

• || ALL my bots have gender neutral user ||

• || THIS BOT IS ❌NOT❌ MADE TO BE RACIST, THIS IS WHAT HAPPENED BACK IN THE 1600. THESE ARE FACTS, NOT ANYTHING ELSE. IF YOU FEEL OFFENDED, READ A HISTORY BOOK. ||

• || Inspiration; Pocahontas, the Disney movie and the real one. ||

• || I'm pretty sure this dude is like a video game character or something from all the similar fan arts I've seen on google.. also, I really love the picture cause he looks so pretty and tiger like ||

• || I'm honestly NOT really liking the title but I don't have any other ideas, so if you have any other idea I'll gladly hear you out 💀.. ||
